channel.title: Kohls on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Kohls on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working at Kohl's as an Associate: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A detailed review of working as a Kohl's retail associate, covering pay, daily duties, employee pros and cons, and practical tips.

item.title: Working at Kohl's as a Cashier: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: What it's really like working as a Kohl's cashier, including hourly pay, credit card expectations, daily tasks, and real employee reviews.
